heading: Operations
label: 3201 Operations
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.heading: Operating plan
children.label: a Operating plan
children.text: The provisions of the contract between the Secretary and an entity selected to operate a Job Corps center shall, at a minimum, serve as an operating plan for the Job Corps center.

children.heading: Additional information
children.label: b Additional information
children.text: The Secretary may require the operator, in order to remain eligible to operate the Job Corps center, to submit such additional information as the Secretary may require, which shall be considered part of the operating plan.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: c Availability
children.text: The Secretary shall make the operating plan described in subsections (a) and (b), excluding any proprietary information, available to the public.
